# IAA Pre-Brief — Wave layer-down-iaa-workflows — Layer Down IAA Pre-Brief and Governance Watchdog Workflows from ISMS

**Wave**: layer-down-iaa-workflows  
**Branch**: copilot/governance-layer-down-iaa-workflows  
**Issue**: [Governance] Layer down IAA pre-brief and governance watchdog workflows from ISMS  
**Generated by**: independent-assurance-agent (IAA session-030)  
**Date**: 2026-04-09  
**Adoption Phase at Generation**: PHASE_B_BLOCKING — verdicts are hard-blocking  
**Authority**: CS2 (Johan Ras / @APGI-cmy)  
**IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL**: v1.2.1 §Pre-Brief Content Requirements  

---

## Wave Summary

Layer down and adapt four IAA and governance hardening workflows from `maturion-isms` (#1312)
into AMC (`app_management_centre`). The implementing agent is **integration-builder** under
Foreman supervision.

Deliverables:
1. `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-inject.yml` — Automatic IAA Pre-Brief invocation + escalation
2. `.github/workflows/governance-watchdog.yml` — Gap 3 hard enforcement: PREHANDOVER watchdog
3. `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-gate.yml` — PR-level IAA Pre-Brief artifact gate
4. `.github/workflows/foreman-reanchor.yml` — Foreman Phase 4 handover checklist reminder
5. Update `governance-liaison-amc-agent.md` — reference four workflows as authoritative

---

## Task Classification and Pre-Brief Coverage

| Task ID | Deliverable | IAA Trigger at Handover | Pre-Brief Coverage |
|---------|-------------|------------------------|-------------------|

## ⚠️ MANDATORY ENVIRONMENT PREREQUISITES

These prerequisites MUST be satisfied before IAA Phase 2–4 invocation. Failure to satisfy any
one of these will result in an **ENVIRONMENT_BOOTSTRAP REJECTION-PACKAGE** immediately on
Step 2.0 branch-reality gate:

### EP-1: wave-current-tasks.md Updated (BLOCKING)
- **Required**: Foreman MUST commit `wave-current-tasks.md` with this wave's task list
  (TASK-WF-01 through TASK-WF-05) before any PR is opened
- **Why**: IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL §Trigger requires wave task list committed before
  the wave is formally opened. The current `wave-current-tasks.md` at HEAD bf1261f
  reflects wave-ecap001-layerdown, not this wave
- **Who fixes**: Foreman (foreman-v2-agent)

### EP-2: All Workflow Files at Committed HEAD (BLOCKING)
- **Required**: All 4 `.github/workflows/*.yml` files committed to branch HEAD with `git status` clean
- **Why**: Step 2.0 branch-reality gate — IAA cannot review uncommitted artifacts
- **Who fixes**: integration-builder (produces), Foreman (verifies before handover)

### EP-3: PREHANDOVER Proof Committed with Pre-Populated Token Reference (BLOCKING)
- **Required**: PREHANDOVER proof file committed to HEAD per §4.3b, with:
  - `iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-030-wave-layer-down-iaa-workflows-YYYYMMDD-PASS` (expected reference)
  - `phase_1_preflight: PREFLIGHT COMPLETE`
  - `ripple_assessment` section (per A-023 standing requirement)
- **Why**: FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-001 and A-029 — PREHANDOVER proof must be committed and immutable
- **Who fixes**: integration-builder (produces under Foreman supervision)

### EP-4: TASK-WF-05 Requires CS2 Pre-Authorization for governance-liaison-amc-agent.md Update (BLOCKING)
- **Required**: If TASK-WF-05 (agent contract update) is included in the PR, it MUST be
  produced by CodexAdvisor with explicit CS2 sign-off per AGCFPP-001 §3–§4
- **Why**: PROHIB-002 (CONSTITUTIONAL) on governance-liaison-amc-agent prohibits self-modification.
  IAA-029 cited this pattern as SUBSTANTIVE; IAA will auto-reject any agent file modification
  by a non-authorized agent
- **Who fixes**: Foreman escalates to CS2; CodexAdvisor applies agent file change
- **Resolution options**: (a) Include TASK-WF-05 in a separate CS2-authorized PR, or (b) CS2
  explicitly pre-authorizes CodexAdvisor to apply the change in the same PR

### EP-5: Ripple Inbox Check (INFORMATIONAL — escalate if blocking)
- **Required**: Verify `.agent-admin/governance/ripple-inbox/` contains no unprocessed entries
  that conflict with or reference these new workflow additions
- **Why**: OVL-LA-003 was cited in sessions 026 and 029; approaching systemic threshold
- **Who fixes**: governance-liaison-amc-agent (OVL-LA-003 compliance)

## TASK-WF-01 Pre-Brief: iaa-prebrief-inject.yml

**Pre-Brief Category**: CI_WORKFLOW (T3/T4 — IAA assures at handover PR only)

### What IAA will check at handover:

#### Functional Integrity (90% of effort)
- [ ] **WF01-F1**: Workflow triggers correctly on `push` to paths `**/.agent-workspace/foreman-v2/personal/wave-current-tasks.md` AND on `pull_request` events
- [ ] **WF01-F2**: Automatic IAA Pre-Brief invocation logic is wired — posts a triggering comment or dispatches to IAA when `wave-current-tasks.md` is pushed
- [ ] **WF01-F3**: Safety net escalation to `@APGI-cmy` fires if Pre-Brief artifact NOT committed within 10 minutes of `wave-current-tasks.md` push — timer/polling logic is present and correct
- [ ] **WF01-F4**: Idempotency guard — does NOT re-trigger if a valid `iaa-prebrief-*.md` already exists for the current wave slug at time of push
- [ ] **WF01-F5**: Workflow permissions declared correctly — `contents: read` OR `contents: write` as required; `pull-requests: write` if posting comments; NO unnecessary `admin` permissions
- [ ] **WF01-F6**: `secret_env_var` (not `secret:`) pattern used for any token references per FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-022 / CORE-022
- [ ] **WF01-F7**: No hardcoded MATURION_BOT_TOKEN fallback to `github.token` — explicit fail-fast if token unavailable
- [ ] **WF01-F8**: AMC-specific path adaptation — `wave-current-tasks.md` path reflects AMC repo structure, not ISMS source
- [ ] **WF01-F9**: Workflow runs on `ubuntu-latest` (AMC standard)

#### Governance Ceremony (10% of effort)
- [ ] **WF01-C1**: File exists at `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-inject.yml`
- [ ] **WF01-C2**: YAML validates without errors (`yaml-lint` / `actionlint`)
- [ ] **WF01-C3**: Authority comment block present: references `IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL.md` v1.2.1

---

## TASK-WF-02 Pre-Brief: governance-watchdog.yml

**Pre-Brief Category**: CI_WORKFLOW (T3/T4 — IAA assures at handover PR only)

### What IAA will check at handover:

#### Functional Integrity (90% of effort)
- [ ] **WF02-F1**: Gap 3 check is **HARD/BLOCKING** (not informational/advisory) — job exits with `exit 1` or `core.setFailed()` when `iaa_audit_token: PENDING` is found in a PREHANDOVER file that contains handover-phase language
- [ ] **WF02-F2**: Scans repo root `*.md` files for PREHANDOVER proof files — pattern matches `PREHANDOVER_PROOF*.md` and any file containing `iaa_audit_token:` in the repo root
- [ ] **WF02-F3**: Correctly distinguishes PENDING token from valid pre-populated token reference (`IAA-session-NNN-waveY-YYYYMMDD-PASS`) — does NOT flag valid pre-populated tokens as PENDING violations (per FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-029)
- [ ] **WF02-F4**: Scan includes `.agent-admin/assurance/` directory for PREHANDOVER proof files, not only repo root
- [ ] **WF02-F5**: Trigger: runs on `pull_request_target` with `types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]` — does NOT bypass Copilot approval gate
- [ ] **WF02-F6**: Informational mode (old advisory behavior) fully removed — no soft warning-only path that allows merge despite PENDING tokens
- [ ] **WF02-F7**: Job name declares governance authority: references `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` and `IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL.md`
- [ ] **WF02-F8**: AMC-specific adaptation: scans AMC's PREHANDOVER proof file naming conventions (both `PREHANDOVER_PROOF*.md` in repo root AND `*-proof-*.md` variants in `.agent-admin/assurance/`)
- [ ] **WF02-F9**: Does NOT produce false positives for archived/historical PREHANDOVER files (files in `PREHANDOVER_PROOF_archive_*` or files with `verdict: ASSURANCE-TOKEN` already present in the same file)

#### Governance Ceremony (10% of effort)
- [ ] **WF02-C1**: File exists at `.github/workflows/governance-watchdog.yml`
- [ ] **WF02-C2**: YAML validates without errors
- [ ] **WF02-C3**: Job classified as hard check — status check name must include `governance/watchdog` or similar

---

## TASK-WF-03 Pre-Brief: iaa-prebrief-gate.yml

**Pre-Brief Category**: CI_WORKFLOW (T3/T4 — IAA assures at handover PR only)

### What IAA will check at handover:

#### Functional Integrity (90% of effort)
- [ ] **WF03-F1**: PR-level gate — **BLOCKS** Copilot/Foreman PRs from review/merge when no `iaa-prebrief-*.md` exists in `.agent-admin/assurance/` for the current wave
- [ ] **WF03-F2**: Wave slug detection logic — correctly extracts current wave slug from `wave-current-tasks.md` to match against Pre-Brief artifact filename
- [ ] **WF03-F3**: Idempotency guard — does NOT re-check or spam if Pre-Brief already confirmed present (check result is cached or short-circuits cleanly)
- [ ] **WF03-F4**: Correctly handles EXEMPT cases — PRs labelled `admin`, `parking-station`, `doc-only` bypass the gate; labelled `layer-down` PRs from governance-liaison bypass gate per existing `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` precedent
- [ ] **WF03-F5**: Does NOT duplicate `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` logic — if `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` already performs the iaa-prebrief existence check, `iaa-prebrief-gate.yml` must add distinct value (e.g., wave-slug-matched check vs. any-prebrief-exists check) or the two must be clearly delineated in scope
- [ ] **WF03-F6**: Blocking enforcement — job fails with clear actionable message: "No IAA Pre-Brief artifact found for wave [slug]. Invoke IAA with action: PRE-BRIEF before opening this PR."
- [ ] **WF03-F7**: Trigger: `pull_request_target` with correct types; does not use plain `pull_request` (Copilot approval gate bypass issue per existing `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` precedent)
- [ ] **WF03-F8**: Permissions minimal — `contents: read`, `pull-requests: read` unless posting is required

#### Governance Ceremony (10% of effort)
- [ ] **WF03-C1**: File exists at `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-gate.yml`
- [ ] **WF03-C2**: YAML validates
- [ ] **WF03-C3**: Deduplication declaration: comment in workflow declaring its scope boundary vs. `preflight-evidence-gate.yml`

---

## TASK-WF-04 Pre-Brief: foreman-reanchor.yml

**Pre-Brief Category**: CI_WORKFLOW (T3/T4 — IAA assures at handover PR only)

### What IAA will check at handover:

#### Functional Integrity (90% of effort)
- [ ] **WF04-F1**: Posts handover-phase (Phase 4) checklist reminder to the orchestrating agent — comment includes ASSURANCE-TOKEN status check as first item
- [ ] **WF04-F2**: Trigger condition is correct — fires when PR is opened or synchronized by Copilot/Foreman agent (NOT on all PRs; must be scoped to agent-driven PRs to avoid noise)
- [ ] **WF04-F3**: Checklist posted includes at minimum:
  - [ ] Phase 1 preflight evidence present in session memory
  - [ ] IAA Pre-Brief artifact committed for current wave
  - [ ] PREHANDOVER proof committed with pre-populated token reference
  - [ ] All artifacts committed to HEAD (git status clean)
  - [ ] ASSURANCE-TOKEN status: [PENDING / ISSUED — reference token ID]
- [ ] **WF04-F4**: Does NOT block merge — this is an informational reminder, NOT a gate; job exits 0 even if checklist items are incomplete
- [ ] **WF04-F5**: Idempotency — does NOT repost checklist on every `synchronize` event; posts once per PR or only if checklist comment is absent
- [ ] **WF04-F6**: Comment targets the correct actor — posts to the PR in a way that notifies the foreman/copilot bot, not spamming human reviewers
- [ ] **WF04-F7**: AMC-specific adaptation — references AMC-specific paths (`.agent-admin/assurance/`, `wave-current-tasks.md` location)

#### Governance Ceremony (10% of effort)
- [ ] **WF04-C1**: File exists at `.github/workflows/foreman-reanchor.yml`
- [ ] **WF04-C2**: YAML validates
- [ ] **WF04-C3**: Informational-only classification documented in workflow header

## TASK-WF-05 Pre-Brief: governance-liaison-amc-agent.md Update

**Pre-Brief Category**: AGENT_CONTRACT — **QUALIFYING for Pre-Brief coverage**  
**⚠️ BLOCKED: AGCFPP-001 + PROHIB-002 (CONSTITUTIONAL) — See EP-4 above**

### Governance Prerequisite (mandatory before build):
This task CANNOT be executed by governance-liaison-amc-agent. It requires:
1. CS2 explicit pre-authorization
2. CodexAdvisor as the producing agent
3. IAA invocation at handover (AGENT_CONTRACT trigger, AC-01 through AC-07)

If this task is NOT included in the wave (CS2 decides to defer), the other 4 workflow tasks
can proceed without it. The acceptance criterion "Workflows are referenced from governance-liaison-amc
contract as authoritative" would be deferred.

### What IAA will check at handover (IF TASK-WF-05 is included):

#### Functional Integrity (90% of effort)
- [ ] **WF05-F1**: The four new workflow filenames are explicitly referenced in governance-liaison-amc-agent.md under an authoritative workflows section or within the governance.workflows block
- [ ] **WF05-F2**: Reference text correctly describes the role of each workflow (not just lists filenames) — watchdog as "hard enforcement Gap 3", prebrief-gate as "PR-level blocking gate", etc.
- [ ] **WF05-F3**: No scope expansion beyond the 4 workflow references — no unauthorized changes to governance-liaison's write_access, prohibited list, or other contract sections
- [ ] **WF05-F4**: Contract version bump present (e.g., 3.4.0 → 3.5.0 or appropriate next version)
- [ ] **WF05-F5**: CANON_INVENTORY.json updated to reflect new governance-liaison-amc-agent.md hash if the inventory tracks this file

#### Governance Ceremony (10% of effort)
- [ ] **WF05-C1**: Producing agent is CodexAdvisor (not governance-liaison) — verified via git log `--author`
- [ ] **WF05-C2**: PREHANDOVER proof contains `cs2_preauthorization: CONFIRMED` or equivalent CS2 sign-off reference
- [ ] **WF05-C3**: IAA invocation evidence present (FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-001)
- [ ] **WF05-C4**: Ripple assessment section present in PREHANDOVER (FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-023)
- [ ] **WF05-C5**: AC-01 through AC-07 checks will all apply at handover

## FAIL-ONLY-ONCE Rules to Apply at Handover

The following FFA rules will be applied at handover review for this wave's PR:

| Rule ID | Rule | Applies To |
|---------|------|-----------|
| A-001 | IAA invocation evidence must be present for agent contract PRs | TASK-WF-05 (if included) |
| A-002 | No class exemptions — IAA mandatory for all agent contract PRs | TASK-WF-05 |
| A-003 | Ambiguity resolves to mandatory IAA invocation | All tasks |
| A-006 | Fabricated token detection — pre-populated reference is valid; bare date or placeholder is not | All tasks |
| A-021 | Commit before invocation — all artifacts must be at HEAD | All tasks |
| A-022 | `secret_env_var` pattern required (not `secret:`) in workflow files | TASK-WF-01 through WF-04 |
| A-023 | Ripple Assessment section required in PREHANDOVER proof | TASK-WF-05 (if included) |
| A-029 | §4.3b token architecture — pre-populated token is valid; PENDING is the old pattern | TASK-WF-05 (if included) |
| A-036 | Systemic blocker promotion — PROHIB-002 violation if governance-liaison attempts agent file modification | TASK-WF-05 |

## PREHANDOVER Proof Structure Required

The PREHANDOVER proof file committed to HEAD MUST contain the following minimum structure:

```markdown
# PREHANDOVER PROOF — [Wave: layer-down-iaa-workflows]
## Session Metadata
iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-030-wave-layer-down-iaa-workflows-YYYYMMDD-PASS
phase_1_preflight: PREFLIGHT COMPLETE
wave: layer-down-iaa-workflows
producing_agent: integration-builder
foreman_session: [session ID]
branch: copilot/governance-layer-down-iaa-workflows
commit_sha: [HEAD SHA at handover]

## Deliverables Evidence
- [ ] `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-inject.yml` — committed, YAML validates
- [ ] `.github/workflows/governance-watchdog.yml` — committed, YAML validates
- [ ] `.github/workflows/iaa-prebrief-gate.yml` — committed, YAML validates
- [ ] `.github/workflows/foreman-reanchor.yml` — committed, YAML validates
- [ ] [If included] `governance-liaison-amc-agent.md` — committed, version bump present

## Branch Reality Gate Evidence
git_status: CLEAN
git_ls_tree_head: [output confirming all 4 workflow files at HEAD]

## Ripple Assessment (FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-023)
[Declare whether any canon ripple from maturion-foreman-governance references or 
 is affected by these 4 workflows. If no ripple: declare explicitly "No active
 ripple entry references this wave's deliverables."]

## Environment Prerequisites Check
- [ ] EP-1: wave-current-tasks.md updated for this wave — [CONFIRMED / PENDING]
- [ ] EP-2: All 4 workflows at committed HEAD — [CONFIRMED]
- [ ] EP-3: PREHANDOVER proof committed with pre-populated token — [CONFIRMED]
- [ ] EP-4: CS2 pre-authorization for TASK-WF-05 — [CONFIRMED / DEFERRED — WF-05 not in scope]
- [ ] EP-5: Ripple inbox cleared — [CONFIRMED / entries listed]
```

---

## Scope Blockers and Governance Conflicts

### BLOCKER-1: wave-current-tasks.md Not Updated (ENVIRONMENT_BOOTSTRAP risk)
**Severity**: HIGH — will cause ENVIRONMENT_BOOTSTRAP REJECTION-PACKAGE if not resolved  
**Status**: ACTIVE  
**Required action**: Foreman MUST update `wave-current-tasks.md` with this wave's scope before PR opens  
**Who resolves**: foreman-v2-agent

### BLOCKER-2: TASK-WF-05 PROHIB-002 Constitutional Barrier
**Severity**: HIGH — SUBSTANTIVE if governance-liaison attempts agent file modification  
**Status**: ACTIVE — PROHIB-002 (CONSTITUTIONAL) on governance-liaison-amc-agent  
**Required action**: CS2 must authorize CodexAdvisor to apply agent contract update; OR CS2 
decides to defer TASK-WF-05 to a separate wave  
**Who resolves**: CS2 decision required; Foreman escalates

### BLOCKER-3: Overlap with preflight-evidence-gate.yml (Design Conflict Risk)
**Severity**: MEDIUM — functional design conflict risk, not governance blocker  
**Status**: ADVISORY — requires integration-builder to resolve  
**Finding**: `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` already contains an `iaa-prebrief-check` job that
verifies `iaa-prebrief-*.md` exists in `.agent-admin/assurance/`. The new `iaa-prebrief-gate.yml`
must NOT duplicate this check without differentiation. Integration-builder must either:
- Clearly scope `iaa-prebrief-gate.yml` to add the wave-slug-matched check (more specific)
- Coordinate with Foreman to determine if `preflight-evidence-gate.yml` should be updated instead
**IAA check WF03-F5 will verify this at handover**

### BLOCKER-4: governance-watchdog.yml False-Positive Risk (Design Quality Concern)
**Severity**: MEDIUM — functional design quality concern  
**Status**: ADVISORY  
**Finding**: The repo root contains a large number of historical `PREHANDOVER_PROOF*.md` files
(100+ files visible in repo root). The watchdog MUST correctly distinguish active (pending) vs.
historical (already-resolved) PREHANDOVER files. A naive scan for `iaa_audit_token: PENDING`
will produce false positives on archived files. IAA check WF02-F9 will verify this at handover.

### NON-BLOCKER: IAA-029 Rejection Still Open on ECAP-001 Wave
**Severity**: INFO — does not block this wave  
**Status**: Open REJECTION on different branch (`copilot/layer-down-propagate-governance-changes-again`)  
**Finding**: IAA-029 REJECTION-PACKAGE is on a different branch for ECAP-001 content. It does
NOT block this `copilot/governance-layer-down-iaa-workflows` branch. However, if ECAP-001
work (INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md, IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL.md) is not yet merged to
main, the canon state on which these new workflows depend may be in flux.

## IAA Handover Invocation Instructions

When integration-builder has completed all 4 (or 5) deliverables and all environment
prerequisites are satisfied, the Foreman invokes IAA for Phase 2–4 assurance as follows:

1. Ensure all prerequisites EP-1 through EP-5 are satisfied
2. Commit all artifacts to branch HEAD (`git status` clean)
3. Invoke: `task(agent_type: "independent-assurance-agent")` with:
   - PR number
   - Branch: `copilot/governance-layer-down-iaa-workflows`
   - Invoking agent: foreman-v2-agent
   - Producing agent: integration-builder (+ CodexAdvisor for WF-05 if included)
   - Reference this Pre-Brief artifact: `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-prebrief-wave-layer-down-iaa-workflows.md`

IAA will run Phase 2 (alignment), Phase 3 (assurance work), Phase 4 (verdict + handover).
The pre-brief checks WF01-F1 through WF05-C5 will be IAA's working checklist.
